metadata.title: Cognitive Abstraction Layers (CAL): A Research Architecture for Hierarchical Semantic Compression in AI Systems
metadata.description:
Pre-paper v1.4 of the Cognitive Abstraction Layers (CAL) framework: a five-level (L0–L4) research architecture for hierarchical semantic compression of multi-agent AI pipeline state, preserving causal structure for human governance. This version (v1.4) adds the L3 closure summary (§5.7): causal conservation under compression characterized as preservation of observational invariants Ω₀ = (Reachability, Coverage, Consistency), not reconstruction fidelity; and the L4 gate-C status note (§6.2).

This is a new version of the existing CAL concept record (concept DOI 10.5281/zenodo.20430343). It supersedes the v1.3 deposit.
